claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.note: Spend estimated from local-CLI input/output token counts using $1/Mtok input + $5/Mtok output. Calls executed via the local `claude` CLI under the user's existing Claude Code subscription, so actual subscription cost is bundled.

note: Token counts are CLI-reported; cost is an upper-bound estimate using published Haiku pricing. Total well under the $5 task cap and the $10 default per-task limit.
